metadata.title: Goldberg Aria (Bass Techno)
metadata.description: Bass techno treatment of Bach's Goldberg Variations Aria (BWV 988). Piano plays the Aria melody at full speed over a driving 4/4 sub bass pulse on the Goldberg ground, four-on-the-floor kick, and stab pad chord hits. The Aria's ornamental contour survives intact — the baroque melody floats above the techno machinery, creating a tense fusion between classical form and industrial rhythm. Piano leads the mix; clean sub bass provides harmonic weight without competing..
